dict.string: BRIX uses the camera to capture property photos, videos, and documents for the Property Digital Twin and field due diligence.
BRIX uses the microphone only when you record voice notes for property walkthroughs.
BRIX accesses selected photos and videos you choose to attach to a property, project, or deal.
BRIX may save captured property images to your library only when you choose to export or save them.
BRIX uses location only with permission to tag field captures to a property visit and improve property organization.
BRIX imports documents you select for inspection, bid, lease, and due diligence analysis.
